description.unified: Throws a spear at the farthest enemy, dealing Physical DMG, pulling them in front of you. Then deals Physical DMG to enemies within range and stuns them for [3 sec->1sec].
For 5sec, your Physical Block Chance is increased by [(added) 800]. When you block, deals Physical DMG to nearby enemies and reduces their ATK by [20%->25%]. [(removed) 15 sec duration]

For 5sec, increases all allies’ Physical Block Chance by 400 and prepares to leap. While preparing, becomes immune to status ailments. When you block, increases the leap attack’s DMG by [7%->8%] and deals Physical DMG to the attacker. When preparation ends, leaps to the nearest enemy, dealing Physical DMG and stuns them for [4 sec->1sec]. [(removed) stun during preparation]
Increases all allies’ Physical Defense by [???->60*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))] and Physical Block Chance by [250->120].

IV.unified: Increases the duration of stun by [2 sec->0.5 sec].

light.unified: Mana cost is increased by [1 additional Mana Cost->1000], but pulls in 2 enemies.

dark.unified: Cooldown is reduced by 2 sec. [(removed) All pulled enemies take 25% increased DMG from all sources for 10 sec]

light.unified: Mana cost is reduced by 1000. [(removed) Deals extra P.DMG based on P.DEF.]

dark.unified: On cast, increases all allies’ Physical Defense by [20%->15%] for [10 sec->5 sec].
On cast, increases all allies’ Physical DMG reduction by 30% for 5 sec. [(removed) While casting, all allies take 20% reduced P.DMG.]

light.unified: Physical Defense increase amount increases by 50%. [(removed) P.DEF is increased by 20% and P. Block is boosted by 50%.]

dark.unified: Physical Block Chance increases by 120. [(removed) Recovers HP equal to 40% of P.DEF upon blocking.]

description.unified: [Will to Win] increases P.Block chance by 400 and raises the target’s P.DMG taken by {0}% for 5 sec.
[Steel Fortress] increases DMG Boost on Block by 24% and extends the Stun duration of Leap Attack by {0} sec.
[Spearhead] recovers 40% of P.DEF every sec when blocking, and increases P.DEF gained by {0}% for 5 sec. P.DEF Boost can stack up to 5 times.

dark.unified: At the start of each battle, reduces all enemies’ Attack by [20%->15%] for 6 sec. This effect cannot be dispelled.

description.unified: Increases all allies’ Physical Defense by {0}%. On block, has a {1}% chance to restore {2} Mana to yourself and reduce the cooldown of all skills by 1 sec.
